eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Hawaii, HI; at 3:25 PM on MAY 3, 2019 Effective until 3:40 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is only a system test.  Send from Hawaii County Civil Defense. 808-935-0031. No action required.  End of Message.
